relationships: ber:Sami iga laman deg waṭas n yimdanen aydeg ur yelli ara yessefk laman
ber:Sami yumen aṭas n yimdanen ur yelli ara yessefk ad ten-yamen
ber:Sami yefles aṭas n yimdanen ur yelli ara yessefk ad ten-yefles
ber:Dɣa d tidet yezmer ad yečč wassaɣ gar sin yimdanen izedɣen deg yideggen yemgugen﹖
ber:Dɣa d tidet yezmer ad yečč wassaɣ gar sin yimdanen izedɣen deg yideggen yembaɛaden﹖
ber:Dɣa d tidet yezmer ad yečč wassaɣ gar sin yimdanen izedɣen deg yimukan yembaɛaden﹖
ber:Tetten wassaɣen gar sin yimdanen izedɣen deg yideggen yembaɛaden﹖
